user_query: what are the PR review rules?
final_answer_preview:
I couldn’t find PR review rules in the current search results. The page returned is the Engineering Onboarding Guide, which covers:

- Week 1: Set up your development environment (DevSetup script in the Platform repo), install Docker, configure VPN, request Azure DevOps access.
- Week 2: Shadow your team, attend the weekly architecture review every Tuesday at 10:00 CET, and complete security train
